what: Repair missing or corrupt structure components
why: Automatically fix issues found in validation steps to avoid manual intervention
output: Repair report indicating which issues were fixed and which remain

event.message: All integrity issues have been repaired successfully

error_handling.criteria: Repair process attempted but one or more issues could not be resolved
error_handling.action: Log error, continue with degraded functionality

event.message: Self-heal failed — some integrity issues remain unresolved

decisions.outcome: Integrity check complete, proceed to next boot phase
Continue with degraded functionality, notify user
